pages.name: index.html
pages.editableElements:
.hero-badge :field(name:heroBadge, type:string),
.hero-title :field(name:heroTitle, type:string),
.hero-subtitle :field(name:heroSubtitle, type:text),
.hero-cta :field(name:heroCtaButtons, type:array, options(layout:list)),
.hero-stats :field(name:heroStats, type:array, options(layout:list)),
.social-proof-label :field(name:socialProofLabel, type:string),
.social-proof-logos :field(name:socialProofLogos, type:array, options(layout:list)),
#features .section-header .eyebrow :field(name:featuresEyebrow, type:string),
#features .section-header .section-title :field(name:featuresTitle, type:string),
#features .section-header .section-subtitle :field(name:featuresSubtitle, type:text),
.features-grid :field(name:features, type:array, options(layout:list)),
#how-it-works .section-header .eyebrow :field(name:howItWorksEyebrow, type:string),
#how-it-works .section-header .section-title :field(name:howItWorksTitle, type:string),
#how-it-works .section-header .section-subtitle :field(name:howItWorksSubtitle, type:text),
.steps :field(name:steps, type:array, options(layout:list)),
#reviews .section-header .eyebrow :field(name:reviewsEyebrow, type:string),
#reviews .section-header .section-title :field(name:reviewsTitle, type:string),
#reviews .section-header .section-subtitle :field(name:reviewsSubtitle, type:text),
.testimonials-grid :field(name:testimonials, type:array, options(layout:list)),
#faq .section-header .eyebrow :field(name:faqEyebrow, type:string),
#faq .section-header .section-title :field(name:faqTitle, type:string),
.faq-list :field(name:faqs, type:array, options(layout:list)),
#cta .cta-title :field(name:ctaTitle, type:string),
#cta .cta-subtitle :field(name:ctaSubtitle, type:text),
#cta .cta-buttons :field(name:ctaButtons, type:array, options(layout:list)),
.footer-brand p :field(name:footerDescription, type:text)
